Symptoms may include pain, hearing loss, ringing in the ears, and discharge. Treatment varies depending on the specific condition and severity. Make Appointment Make Appointment Dr. Mohammed Humaam Ansari Nose Disease Nose diseases comprise various ailments affecting the nasal cavity and sinuses, including rhinitis (inflammation of the nasal mucosa), sinusitis (inflammation of the sinuses), nasal polyps (noncancerous growths), and deviated septum (misalignment of the nasal septum). Symptoms often include congestion, nasal discharge, facial pain, and impaired smell. Make Appointment Make Appointment ENT Care Clinic Dr Mohammed Humaam Ansari M.B.B.S., M.S.(ENT), MRCS-ENT (London) ENT Consultant & Head Neck Surgeon Dr. Mohammed Humaam Ansari is a highly skilled ENT Consultant and Head Neck Surgeon with over 10 years of extensive experience. Holding an MBBS and M.S. in Otorhinolaryngology, as well as an ENT surgeon, I am dedicated to enhancing the health and well-being of my patients by providing the highest level of care. With extensive experience in diagnosing and treating a diverse range of ENT conditions, I have acquired my surgical skills and expertise to deliver outcomes. My patient-centered approach, compassionate communication, and commitment to continuous learning have earned me the trust and respect of both patients and peers. I am eager to collaborate with fellow medical professionals to advance the field of Otorhinolaryngology and improve the lives of individuals in need. View More Detail View More Detail OUR SPECIALTIES Tympanoplasty Tympanoplasty is the surgical procedure performed to repair a perforated tympanic membrane, with/without reconstruction of the ossicles. read more Mastoidectomy Mastoidectomy is a surgical procedure of the temporal bone that opens postauricular air cells by removing the thin bony partitions between them. read more Ossiculoplasty Ossiculoplasty is the surgical restoration of the sound transmitting mechanism of the middle ear. A myriad of prosthetics and surgical techniques. read more Stapedectomy A stapedectomy is surgery to remove a small bone, called the stapes, from the middle ear. The middle ear contains three bones: stapes, incus, and malleus. read more Endoscopic Septoplasty The primary advantage of the endoscopic septoplasty is the ability to reduce the morbidity by limiting the dissection to the area of deviation. read more Septorhinoplasty A septorhinoplasty is an operation to improve the appearance of your nose (rhinoplasty) and to improve how you breathe through your nose. read more Adenoid Surgery Adenoid removal is surgery to take out the adenoid glands. The adenoid glands sit behind your nose above the roof of your mouth in the nasopharynx. read more Tonsillectomy Tonsillectomy is a surgery to remove the tonsils. The tonsils are glands at the back of your throat. The tonsils are often removed along with the adenoid glands. read more Patient Feedback Dr. Humaam is an exceptional ENT surgeon. His expertise, precision, and dedication to patient care truly stand out. The procedure I underwent was seamless, and the recovery process was smoother than I could have imagined. I am incredibly grateful for his outstanding work and would highly recommend him to anyone in need of ENT care. As the field of medical science has progressed, we have started to diagnose an array of conditions that were previously indiscernible. With that we are also now progressing beyond treating just Recurrent sore throats and Allergic rhinitis to being able to treat Congenital hearing loss and Anterior Skull Base lesions. ENT is one field where we are able to give medical management for a lot of conditions like Tonsillitis and Adenoid Hypertrphy with Serous otitis media, Seasonal Allergic rhinitis, Otitis media, Oral Ulcers and Laryngitis amongst many others. While at the same time striking immediately with a surgical precision for Polyps in the Nose, Cholesteatoma in the ear, Tumors of the Neck, Septal Deviation and Vocal Cord lesions. Latest advances such as Coblation, Microdebrider, CO2 Laser have made our surgeries much more precise and less time consuming. Better camera systems have made visualising the surgical field a breeze and resulted in far better outcomes for patients than in the past. Here's hoping that the advances reach such a stage where we can prevent illnesses rather than cure them. Wishing you the Best of Health! Dr. Mohammed Humaam Ansari is a highly skilled ENT Consultant and Head Neck Surgeon with over 10 years of extensive experience. Holding an MBBS and M.S. in Otorhinolaryngology, as well as an MRCS in ENT, he possesses comprehensive expertise in the diagnosis and treatment of ear, nose, and throat conditions. Dr. Ansari is dedicated to providing exceptional care to his patients, employing advanced surgical techniques and evidence-based practices. His commitment to excellence and compassionate approach make him a trusted healthcare professional in the field of Otorhinolaryngology, ensuring optimal outcomes for individuals seeking treatment for ENT disorders.
